name: gtm-brain
description: Interview a business owner and produce a tiered, org-specific GTM Brain spec: a plain-language Strategy Readout over a builder-ready, provenance-tagged Build Spec, plus an Open Items handoff list. Research-grounded (public web), tool-agnostic; any business type; ~30-60 minutes.

interface.shortDescription: Create a GTM Brain spec through a guided interview.
interface.longDescription: GTM Brain interviews a business owner and produces a plain-language Strategy Readout, a builder-ready Build Spec, and an Open Items handoff list. It is tool-agnostic and ships no connectors — it names capabilities and maps them onto the tools the owner already uses.
defaultPrompt: Review my GTM Brain open items.
